scripts.predev: mkdir -p src/assets/schema/latest && cp ../src/pkg/schema/zarf-v1alpha1-schema.json src/assets/schema/latest/v1alpha1.json && cp ../src/pkg/schema/zarf-v1beta1-package-schema.json src/assets/schema/latest/v1beta1.json && node hack/copy-examples.js
scripts.prebuild: mkdir -p src/assets/schema/latest && cp ../src/pkg/schema/zarf-v1alpha1-schema.json src/assets/schema/latest/v1alpha1.json && cp ../src/pkg/schema/zarf-v1beta1-package-schema.json src/assets/schema/latest/v1beta1.json && node hack/copy-examples.js
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && astro check && astro build
